modal.title: Import review from other apps
modal.sub_title: Export reviews from your current reviews app and import them here

success.title: Import sucessfully
success.sub_title: All imported reviews are displayed in the table below

error.title: Imported unsuccessfully. Please try again
error.subtitle: There was an error trying to import reviews. Please try again later.
error.fail_provider: Import failed, please make sure you select the correct corresponding provider
error.fail_structure: The structure and organization of the uploaded file's fields do not match! Please ensure that the file adheres to the required format and try again
error.fail_type: The file field must be a file of type: csv, .xlsx.
error.fail_structure_detail: You imported a file from <1>{{source}}</1>. The file you imported is missing the following fields: <1>{{fields}}</1>. Please check the file again and re-import. If you need assistance, click the '<1>{{btn}}</1>' button below to chat with us.

modal.import_processing_title: Your file has been submitted successfully!
modal.import_processing_message: The import process may take a few minutes. We'll notify you by your store email {{email}} when it's complete. Be sure to check your inbox, including spam and promotions folders.

table.empty_message: Looks like you're all caught up! No new reviews to read at this time.
table.no_review_approve: Uh oh, it's time to break the silence! Send a friendly reminder to your customers and ask them to share their thoughts and leave a review.
table.search_helptext: Try changing the filters or search term
table.modal_delete_warning: This action will delete the selected review(s) permanently
table.modal_reply_all_placeholder: Example: Thank you for your review! We're delighted to hear you're enjoying our product. If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to reach out. We appreciate your support!
table.modal_reply_all_warning: Some selected reviews already have responses. Do you want to update with a new reply or keep the existing one and skip them?
table.modal_warning_content: Heads up! Deleting this review means customers won't be able to review back. Consider responding to the review instead.
table.modal_warning_delete_response: Hold up! Deleting your response to this review could leave the customer's feedback unaddressed. Consider editing or updating your response instead.
table.modal_warning_title: Are you sure to delete this comment
table.subtitle_pending_review: Collect reviews by setting up request email or importing
table.subtitle_approved_review: Take a look on pending reviews and show them publicly on your store
table.subtitle_unpublished_reviews: This page shows reviews which are supposed to be hidden. Publish them again whenever you want!
table.number_of_report: This review has been reported {{number}} times.

review_detail.reply_placeholder: Reply to customer reviews with your feedback...
review_detail.send_notice_helptext: Send a notification email to the customer with your reply
review_detail.send_notice_sub_helptext: Enable to send a notification with your reply using the Review response template.
review_detail.review_info_helptext: Encourage customers to adjust their reviews by sharing a Review Link
review_detail.share_review: Share review as a public link

filter.search_reviews: Search by email, product, title or content...

all_media_page.empty_media_detail: Select a media to see the detailed review
